movie.title: Maharshi (2019) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & Telugu] WEB-DL 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDrive
movie.synopsis: Rishi, a millionaire businessman, returns to his homeland, where he becomes the champion of poor and downtrodden farmers. Directed by Vamsi Paidipally, Maharshi features Mahesh Babu and Pooja Hegde in central roles.
